items.title: Liquid Glass Switcher Css
items.description: Liquid Glass Switcher Css is an uploaded ZIP demo focused on css patterns, ready for review and refinement.
items.brief: Create a new POC exactly as we have on the zip file

items.title: Hollow Topographic Metaballs
items.description: Animated hollow metaballs layered over topographic contours, producing organic field deformation with smooth shader-driven motion.
items.brief: Analyse the zip file and mimic the exact functionallities on a new POC
items.code: Pocs

items.title: Holographic Glitch Interface
items.description: Pure CSS composition with glitch typography, holographic card treatment, grain texture, and subtle pseudo-3D depth cues.
items.code: Pocs

items.title: Animated toggle
items.description: Animated toggle is an uploaded ZIP demo focused on animation patterns, ready for review and refinement.
items.brief: Preciso que aplique o viridis da Veeam nesse estilo
items.code: Animated toggle

items.title: Pixel Loader
items.description: Retro pixel-style loading animation with stepped timing and compact looping motion, ideal for hero preload moments and playful UI states.
items.brief: Copiar como referência o que existe em https://codepen.io/artzub/pen/XJJooON
items.code: Pixel Loader

items.title: Card Beam Stream
items.description: Animated card conveyor with scanning beam, particle field, and motion controls for high-impact hero visuals.
items.brief:
https://codepen.io/blacklead-studio/pen/xbwaqxE
quero copiar isso, porém implementando o look and feel da Veeam
items.code: Speed: 120 px/s

items.title: Electric Border
items.description: Electric animated border with turbulence displacement, glow layers, and glass overlays for high-impact UI panels.
items.code:
Dramatic

Electric Border

In case you'd like to emphasize something very dramatically.

items.description: Interactive WebGL liquid gradient with mouse-reactive distortion and color controls, built on Three.js.

items.title: Animated Border Gradient
items.description: Pure CSS animated conic-border treatment for highlighting cards or callouts without JavaScript.

items.title: Animated Gradient Background
items.description: CSS-only animated background gradient for dynamic hero sections or landing pages.
items.code:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Pure CSS Animated Gradient Background</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/twitter-bootstrap/5.0.2/css/bootstrap.min.css" />
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.7.2/css/all.min.css" />
  <style>
/* veeam-font-inline */
@font-face {
  font-family: "ES Build";
  src: url("assets/fonts/esbuild/ESBuildNeutral-Regular.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "ES Build";
  src: url("assets/fonts/esbuild/ESBuildNeutral-Medium.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 500;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "ES Build";
  src: url("assets/fonts/esbuild/ESBuildNeutral-SemiBold.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}
html, body {
	font-family: "ES Build", "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; margin: 0; height: 100%; }
body {
	background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #00D15F, #32F26F, #57E0FF, #3700FF);
	background-size: 400% 400%;
	animation: gradient 15s ease infinite;
	height: 100vh;
}
@keyframes gradient {
	0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
	50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
	100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
}</style>
</head>
<body>
  
</body>
</html>
